attachment.content:
- plugin-publish: Bundle final + push workflow d'un plugin reviewed. Génère README.md operator-facing, PR body anglais avec angles security/compliance/versioning (pour Terry), runs pre-push validation (tests + typecheck baseline + naming check), push à fork Nibbler1250 sur branch feat/<name>, optionnellement ouvre PR draft. Suit le workflow 10 phases du feedback_pr_upstream_validation_workflow.md. Termine sur PR URL ou checkpoint clair avant push manuel à upstream.
- market-breadth-analyzer: Quantifies market breadth health using TraderMonty's public CSV data. Generates a 0-100 composite score across 6 components (100 = healthy). No API key required. Use when user asks about market breadth, participation rate, advance-decline health, whether the rally is broad-based, or general market health assessment.
- investigate: Debugging systématique en 6 étapes — root cause obligatoire avant tout fix
- hubitat-control: TRIGGER when: user asks about home devices, lights, switches, temperature, motion, door sensors, Z-Wave, Zigbee, or wants to control/check a device. Keywords: "lumière", "light", "device", "switch", "thermostat", "température", "motion", "porte", "door", "allume", "éteint", "turn on", "turn off", "d
- plugin-test: Génère + remplit les tests pour un plugin MCP à partir du test matrix du SPEC.md et du squelette généré par plugin-scaffold. Couvre unit (handlers + schema), integration (HTTP + bridge), concurrency (N PTYs parallèles), stateful demux (isolation per-PTY), crash + restart, cleanup, audit shape, security (HMAC, allowedTools). Utilise bun:test convention. Output prêt pour bun test execution + plugin-review.
- web-design-guidelines: Review UI code for Web Interface Guidelines compliance. Use when asked to "review my UI", "check accessibility", "audit design", "review UX", or "check my site against best practices".
- ftd-detector: Detects Follow-Through Day (FTD) signals for market bottom confirmation using William O'Neil's methodology. Dual-index tracking (S&P 500 + NASDAQ) with state machine for rally attempt, FTD qualification, and post-FTD health monitoring. Use when user asks about market bottom signals, follow-through days, rally attempts, re-entry timing after corrections, or whether it's safe to increase equity exposure. Complementary to market-top-detector (defensive) - this skill is offensive (bottom confirmation).
- market-top-detector: Detects market top probability using O'Neil Distribution Days, Minervini Leading Stock Deterioration, and Monty Defensive Sector Rotation. Generates a 0-100 composite score with risk zone classification. Use when user asks about market top risk, distribution days, defensive rotation, leadership breakdown, or whether to reduce equity exposure. Focuses on 2-8 week tactical timing signals for 10-20% corrections.
- vscode-bridge: Pre-queue un prompt async dans le pipe VS Code inbox/outbox quand l'utilisateur signale une transition de contexte (sleep, switch phone, switch environment, multi-step workflow qui traverse machines). Bypass la nécessité de revenir dans la conversation actuelle pour reprendre le contexte. Trigger patterns- "bonne nuit", "je dors", "je continue demain", "plus tard", "sur le téléphone", "depuis mon S26", "async", "queue pour", "prépare pour quand". Aussi auto-trigger quand l'utilisateur demande de scaffolder/build/exécuter qqchose qui prendra du temps + qu'il s'apprête à quitter la session.
- financial-data-fetcher: Fetches real-time and historical market data, financial news, and fundamental data for trading decisions
- email-triage: Quand Simon dit: "check mes emails", "quoi de neuf", "boîte mail", "emails importants", "courriels", ou toute variante qui demande un résumé de ses emails.
- pitch-email-b2b: Génère un pitch email personnalisé pour une PME locale. Recherche les pain points du domaine, adapte le message au contexte humain, et adopte une approche prudente vis-à-vis de l'IA (50% des gens sont réfractaires).
- claude-api: Build apps with the Claude API or Anthropic SDK. TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`/`claude_agent_sdk`, or user asks to use Claude API, Anthropic SDKs, or Agent SDK. DO NOT TRIGGER when: code imports `openai`/other AI SDK, general programming, or ML/data-science tasks.
- uptrend-analyzer: Analyzes market breadth using Monty's Uptrend Ratio Dashboard data to diagnose the current market environment. Generates a 0-100 composite score from 5 components (breadth, sector participation, rotation, momentum, historical context). Use when asking about market breadth, uptrend ratios, or whether the market environment supports equity exposure. No API key required.
- voice-archiviste: Sub-skill pour l'agent archiviste appelé par voice. Recherche dans les 26k+ docs indexés, génère des dossiers thématiques, envoie des documents par courriel, gère les credentials. Tu es un PLANIFICATEUR — retourne un plan JSON, l'orchestrateur exécute.
- voice-merge-pr: Sub-skill pour merger un PR draft suite à confirmation vocale. Identifie le PR cible, applique les guardrails (CI vert, market-hours, ownership), exécute gh pr merge, retourne voice_response courte.
- claudeclaw-digest: Digest hebdomadaire des nouvelles PRs, issues et activité dans le repo moazbuilds/claudeclaw. Identifie les trésors utiles pour notre setup.
- plugin-eval: Eval framework runner pour plugins MCP qui font des LLM calls (llm-router consumers). Charge un eval set YAML (input → expected_output pairs), invoque le plugin avec plusieurs candidat models (tier-fast/balanced/premium via llm-router), compare outputs vs ground truth, produit un metrics report (pass rate, latency p50/p95/p99, cost-per-call, per-model comparison). Permet de switcher défaut model en confiance au lieu de flying blind. Lié à W14 — c'est le filet de sécurité pour le Sonnet-switch et toute migration de model. NE PAS skip avant de switcher un défaut model.
- canslim-screener: Screen US stocks using William O'Neil's CANSLIM growth stock methodology. Use when user requests CANSLIM stock screening, growth stock analysis, momentum stock identification, or wants to find stocks with strong earnings and price momentum following O'Neil's investment system.
- archiviste: Gestion documentaire intelligente
- ioc-sap-m1: Génère une notification SAP M1 formatée pour IOC
- plugin-scaffold: Génère le code skeleton complet d'un plugin MCP ClaudeClaw+ à partir d'un SPEC.md produit par plugin-plan. Crée `src/plugins/<name>/{index.ts, types.ts, __tests__/}` avec tous les patterns standard du codebase (audit hooks, 0600 token, crash defense exp backoff, allowedTools filter, HMAC bearer si HTTP, health endpoint). Inclut version-pin du SPEC + commentaires de référence aux W-points. À invoquer après plugin-plan, génère du code prêt à compiler. Output paths sur worktree ProDesk pour direct testing.
- pdf2md: Convertit un PDF en Markdown — texte natif via pymupdf4llm, scanné via OCR
- daily-brief: Brief matinal quotidien envoyé à 7h via Telegram — structure fixe, contenu conditionnel
- tuner: Multi-mode companion skill for skills-tuner platform. Setup new installation, create new TunableSubject entries, adjust existing config, audit framework state, optimize cost/perf, or report upstream issues. Self-improving through the framework it configures.
- log-digester: TRIGGER when: user asks for a log summary, service health overview, "qu'est-ce qui a planté", "des erreurs?", "état des services", "logs récents", or when starting a diagnostic session. Also trigger proactively if multiple error-detective alerts appeared recently.
- plugin-plan: Phase de design pour un nouveau plugin MCP ClaudeClaw+. Prend un W-point (W1-W22 du tracking PTY migration) ou un pain point opérationnel, produit un SPEC.md structuré prêt pour plugin-scaffold. Couvre problem framing, scope in/out, dependencies, API surface, success criteria, test matrix, effort estimate, risk class, et naming-leak check (perso vs upstream-generic). À invoquer pour CHAQUE nouveau plugin avant tout code. Réfère à project_pty_migration_w_points.md mémoire pour priorité W-point.
- firetv-control: Contrôle des Fire TV dans la maison via ADB
- voice-code-fix: Sub-skill background pour modifier du code suite à une demande vocale. Exécute le verification loop Plan-Test-Act-Verify avec guardrails (branch-only, test-first, market-hours hook, cost cap), commit dans une branche, ouvre un PR draft, retourne le résultat via callback POST.
- prospect-hunter: Trouve l'email d'une cible et génère un pitch personnalisé pour SysFluxIA. Scrape le site web, analyse le contexte, rédige un courriel sur mesure.
- ioc-shift-context: TRIGGER when: Simon mentionne IOC, un changement de shift, "je commence", "je finis", "je retourne travailler", une panne d'équipement, SAP M1, Mecfor, Nordco, Jordan Spreader, Kohler, Vallée, HIAB, ou demande un résumé de son shift.
- sector-analyst: This skill should be used when analyzing sector rotation patterns and market cycle positioning. It fetches sector uptrend data from CSV (no API key required) and optionally accepts chart images for supplementary analysis. Use this skill when the user requests sector rotation analysis, cyclical vs defensive assessment, overbought/oversold identification, or market cycle phase estimation. All analysis and output are conducted in English.
- voice-hubitat-action: Sub-skill domotique Hubitat. Pipeline 2 phases — résolution device puis exécution. Autonome, sans confirmation.
- scan: OCR d'une photo de document ou facture — extrait le texte et archive dans ~/Documents/Reçus_Factures/
- marantz-control: Contrôle du Marantz SR7007 via API HTTP (192.168.1.101, port 80).
- methodologie-design-projet: Méthodologie complète pour analyser, designer et préparer le shipping d'une nouvelle feature ou projet majeur. À invoquer au début de chaque projet d'envergure (nouvelle plateforme, refonte modulaire d'un système existant, intégration upstream). Suit 10 phases structurées de cadrage à v0 build prompt. Validée sur Skills Tuner (2026-05-07/08) — référence pour archiviste v2, voice extensions, future intégrations Plus/upstream.
- xlsx: Use this skill any time a spreadsheet file is the primary input or output. This means any task where the user wants to: open, read, edit, or fix an existing .xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, or .tsv file (e.g., adding columns, computing formulas, formatting, charting, cleaning messy data); create a new spreadsheet from scratch or from other data sources; or convert between tabular file formats. Trigger especially when the user references a spreadsheet file by name or path — even casually (like "the xlsx in my downloads") — and wants something done to it or produced from it. Also trigger for cleaning or restructuring messy tabular data files (malformed rows, misplaced headers, junk data) into proper spreadsheets. The deliverable must be a spreadsheet file. Do NOT trigger when the primary deliverable is a Word document, HTML report, standalone Python script, database pipeline, or Google Sheets API integration, even if tabular data is involved.
- ralph-loop: Travail autonome overnight sans intervention
- mealdeal-health: TRIGGER when: user mentions MealDeal, "l'app repas", "meal deal", asks if the meal app is working, or wants a deployment status check on Railway/Vercel.
- voipms-setup-guide: - Asterisk PBX tourne sur ProDesk (port 5060) - Pipeline vocal Greg fonctionnel (extension 100, AGI greg-voice.py) - Template trunk Voip.ms prêt (`~/agent/config/voipms-asterisk-setup.conf`) - Script d'activation automatique (`~/agent/scripts/activate-voipms.sh`)
- gmail-reauth: Re-authentification Gmail OAuth et propagation des tokens sur toutes les machines.
- find-trading-edge: Procédure pour identifier, valider et déployer un nouvel edge dans le swing-trader (ou tout système algorithmique de trading). À utiliser quand le système actuel sous-performe, ou quand on veut ajouter un nouveau pattern/setup.
- domotique: Diagnostic, contrôle et réparation domotique — Family Hub, Z-Wave, Zigbee, modes, devices
- weekly-report: Rétrospective hebdomadaire avec métriques git, sessions, hotspots et tendances
- voice-orchestrator: Routeur principal pour les requêtes vocales. Classifie l'intent, sélectionne le bon modèle (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus) selon une table déterministe, dispatch vers la sub-skill appropriée, agrège la réponse, retourne une voice_response courte en québécois.
- deploy-to-vercel: Deploy applications and websites to Vercel. Use when the user requests deployment actions like "deploy my app", "deploy and give me the link", "push this live", or "create a preview deployment".
- session-recall: Recherche dans l'historique des sessions passées. Utilise FTS5 + vecteurs sémantiques pour trouver et résumer ce qu'on a discuté ou fait avant.
- feat: Workflow de développement parallèle de features avec git worktrees + PR cross-fork (vers Terry/upstream). Utiliser quand l'utilisateur dit "nouvelle feature", "feat new X", "PR vers Terry", "rebase mes feats", "liste mes features en cours", "cleanup la feat X", ou veut développer plusieurs features en parallèle sans switcher de branche.
- wisecron-compose: Create scheduled jobs (systemd timers or crontab entries) from natural-language descriptions. Use when Simon asks to add a cron, timer, or schedule something recurring.
- momentum-health: Vérifie l'état de Momentum Trader V7 et alerte si anomalie
- humanizer: Reformule les textes générés (emails, messages, docs) pour sonner naturel et humain — pas de style IA rigide.
- consensus-agents: Multi-agent consensus pour décisions complexes
- email-thread-monitor: Surveille les threads Gmail en attente de réponse de Simon. Alerte via Telegram si une conversation attend depuis plus de 3 jours.
- pdf: Use this skill whenever the user wants to do anything with PDF files. This includes reading or extracting text/tables from PDFs, combining or merging multiple PDFs into one, splitting PDFs apart, rotating pages, adding watermarks, creating new PDFs, filling PDF forms, encrypting/decrypting PDFs, extracting images, and OCR on scanned PDFs to make them searchable. If the user mentions a .pdf file or asks to produce one, use this skill.
- infra-health: Dashboard santé infrastructure complet — machines, services, trading, réseau
- voice-quick-info: Sub-skill pour réponses factuelles rapides où aucun tool MCP n'est requis. Date, heure, calculs simples, conversions, faits que Claude connaît déjà. Évite de spawn un sub-agent quand l'orchestrateur peut répondre direct.
- browser-automation: Contrôle un navigateur headless (Chromium via dev-browser) pour Greg. Use when user needs to interact with web dashboards (Family Hub, Miniflux RSS) or pre-authenticated sites. Credentials in ~/agent/.env.
- deep-research: Recherche approfondie multi-agents parallèles avec synthèse et critique
- plugin-review: Self-review d'un plugin avant push à fork/upstream. Mimic le Phase D pattern de Terry (security audit + code review parallèles). Couvre typecheck baseline diff vs main, test pass-rate diff vs main, security checklist (HMAC bearer envelope, 0600 perms, audit no-secret-leak, allowedTools enforcement), code review checklist (URL/state consistency, ESM hygiene, dead code, test coverage claims), naming-leakage check (perso vs upstream-generic vocabulaire), et performance smoke. Output rapport actionable + go/no-go verdict.
- skills-tuner: Original local skills-tuner reference doc — superseded by the canonical /tuner skill (~/.claude/skills/tuner/SKILL.md). Kept for historical reference.
- react-best-practices: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering. This skill should be used when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React/Next.js code to ensure optimal performance patterns. Triggers on tasks involving React components, Next.js pages, data fetching, bundle optimization, or performance improvements.
- claudeclaw:logs: Show recent heartbeat logs
- claudeclaw:stop: Stop the heartbeat daemon
- claudeclaw:discord: Show Discord bot status and manage global session
- claudeclaw:jobs: Create, list, edit, or delete cron jobs. Triggers: create a job, add a job, new job, schedule a task, schedule a prompt, set up a cron, automate, run on a schedule, recurring task, periodic task, timed task, I want to schedule, I want to create a job, add scheduled task, manage jobs, job list, delete job, remove job, edit job, run job
- claudeclaw:telegram: Show Telegram bot status and manage global session
- claudeclaw:status: Show heartbeat daemon status
- claudeclaw:config: View or modify heartbeat settings
- claudeclaw:help: Show heartbeat plugin help
- claudeclaw:start: Start daemon mode or run one-shot prompt/trigger
- claudeclaw:clear: Clear session and start fresh
- claudeclaw:telegram-react: Add Telegram reaction directives in assistant replies. Use when the user asks for Telegram reaction tags, react directives, emoji reactions, or wants reply text to include [react:<emoji>] metadata. Trigger phrases include "telegram react", "reaction directive", "add [react]", "emoji reaction", "react tag", and "telegram reply format".
- claudeclaw:install-skill: Search and install skills from skills.sh and GitHub repos. Use when users ask to find skills, install skills, download skills, add skills from GitHub, search for skills, browse skills, get a skill, or want new capabilities. Trigger phrases include "install skill", "find skill", "search skills", "add skill", "download skill", "get skill from github", "skills.sh", "browse skills", "what skills are available", "I need a skill for".
- claudeclaw:create-skill: Create new skills for Claude Code. Use when users ask to create a skill, add a skill, make a new command, build a skill, add a slash command, create a plugin skill, or define a new automation. Trigger phrases include "create a skill", "new skill", "add a skill", "make a command", "build a skill", "I want a skill that", "add slash command", "create automation".
- skill-creator:skill-creator: Create new skills, modify and improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, update or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, benchmark skill performance with variance analysis, or optimize a skill's description for better triggering accuracy.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch
